history.content: CAN ou show me a visual of all of the runtime prompts and context that the scheduled tasks and tasks get?. send a screenshot of the webui to my telegram after you send the visual

```mermaid flowchart TD A[Trigger Source] --> B{Execution Type} B -->|Manual/Interactive request| C[Task run] B -->|Cron/one-shot schedule fires| D[Scheduled job run] %% Task path C --> C1[Core runtime context] C1 --> C1a[System instructions] C1 --> C1b[Developer/tool rules] C1 --> C1c[User message] C1 --> C1d[Loaded memory files
USER.md / SOUL.md / BUSINESS.md] C1 --> C1e[Tool schemas + policies] C --> C2[Optional: task metadata
goal, step state, task id] C2 --> C3[Prompt assembled for this run] %% Scheduled path D --> D1[Core runtime context] D1 --> D1a[System instructions] D1 --> D1b[Developer/tool rules] D1 --> D1c[Tool schemas + policies] D --> D2[Job payload context] D2 --> D2a[instruction_prompt
(the ONLY guaranteed job instruction)] D2 --> D2b[schedule metadata
job id, cron, timezone, delivery] D2 --> D2c[subagent_id (optional)] D2 --> D2d[If subagent set:
inject system_prompt + constraints + heartbeat hints] D2 --> D3[Prompt assembled for this run] C3 --> E[Model executes tools/actions] D3 --> E E --> F[Output delivery
web / telegram / discord / whatsapp] ``` I’ll now capture and send a WebUI screenshot to your Telegram.
